headline: Should Disney’s Strong Q2 and Institutional Support Require Action From Walt Disney (DIS) Investors?
summary: In the past few weeks, Walt Disney reported stronger-than-expected fiscal Q2 results and drew bullish commentary from major Wall Street analysts highlighting progress in streaming, content, and its Parks and Experiences businesses. At the same time, institutional investors such as Sound Shore Management reaffirmed Disney as a core holding, underscoring confidence in the company’s balance sheet and multi-year restructuring efforts despite broader geopolitical and consumer headwinds. We’ll now...
